name: 🦕Dino Onesie Pursuer🐾
description:
★He's sleeping on your lap :)★

Pursuer's fat butt decided to sleep on you while sitting in your recliner, and now you're stuck with the "should I get up while my dog's sleeping on me or sit here for eternity" dilemma.

Requested: Hell yeah twin

MY FIRST REQUESTED BOT WAAAAHOOOOOO!!!!!

Might as well make a Pursuer bot since I stalk every other one, and this request gave me an IIIDEEEAAAAA!!!!!1!1!1!1!

drew the PFP again because I was too lazy to look up Pursuer fanart on Google (Ah yes, I'm too lazy to type a few words on a search engine, so I decide to take the much harder route and make my own fucking image-)

I'm on a ROLL with these bots, I like how they're coming out!!!

Uhh...more nerdy bullshit you won't read...

Yeah....pretty WILD....heh...
